test_cases.title: Page loads and displays main content
steps: Wait for the page to fully load
Verify the main heading is visible
Verify no console errors are present
test_cases.expected: Page loads successfully with visible main content and no errors

selectors.description: Target h1 or main heading element, check body for content

test_cases.title: Navigation links are functional
steps: Identify all navigation links in the header
Verify the URL changes or content updates
test_cases.expected: Navigation links respond to clicks and route correctly

selectors.description: Target nav a, header a, or [role="navigation"] links

test_cases.title: Page is responsive on mobile viewport
steps: Verify main content is visible and not overflowing
Verify text is readable without horizontal scrolling
test_cases.expected: Layout adapts to mobile viewport with no overflow or broken elements

selectors.description: Check body overflow, main content containers

test_cases.title: Interactive elements are accessible via keyboard
steps: Press Tab to focus the first interactive element
test_cases.expected: All interactive elements are reachable via keyboard with visible focus states

selectors.description: Focus on buttons, links, and form inputs

test_cases.title: Page title and meta information are present
steps: Check the document title is not empty
Verify the page has a meaningful title tag
test_cases.expected: Page has a descriptive, non-empty title tag

selectors.description: Use page.title() to retrieve document title
